name: locker.weather_wait
description: Launch a harness-owned Sandy Creek locker baseline, force a cold locker probe state through the debug menu, then wait for a real camp-locker packet.
blocked_reason: The shipped basecamp_dev_manual_2026-04-02 fixture does not contain a CAMP_LOCKER zone, so this contract cannot emit real camp-locker packets yet.
required_helpers: locker-capable fixture or restaging path that installs a real CAMP_LOCKER zone plus managed locker contents on the shipped probe save
